---
title: "Interpretation and Communication"
id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se02"
toc: True
---

This session focuses on visualisation, interpretation, and communicating outbreak findings.

### Learning Objectives
<br>

- Interpret charts and tables used in outbreak analysis.


- Recognise assumptions and limitations in vaccine effectiveness estimates.


- Communicate findings in a public health context.



<br>

<br>

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="../se01/03-calculating-vaccine-effectiveness/OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01-sec03-sp03.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Check Your Understanding</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="01-visualising-results/index.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Visualising Results</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
